summary: Frontend E2E testing of MediBook in French. 8 of 10 critical flows pass. Two issues found: (1) hero search specialty Select dropdown options not selectable -> URL submitted without specialty param; (2) header-logout-btn click does NOT clear session - /dashboard still shows logged-in patient after logout.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking hero-search-specialty opens trigger but Radix SelectContent options are not reachable / not selected by Playwright (get_by_role('option') count=0). Submit then fires without specialty param, URL becomes /recherche instead of /recherche?specialty=Dentiste. Likely the Select is uncontrolled and value not bound to form state, OR options are filtered/hidden until typed. Repro: open /, click [data-testid=hero-search-specialty], try select 'Dentiste', click submit -> URL has no specialty.

Clicking [data-testid=header-logout-btn] does NOT actually log the user out. After click and navigation to /dashboard, the user remains logged in (header still shows 'Marie Démo', dashboard still renders with prior appointments). Likely the logout handler is not calling /api/auth/logout, or cookie is not being cleared (samesite=none/secure cookie may need explicit Set-Cookie expire from backend), or auth context state is not reset. Repro: login as patient@demo.fr, click header-logout-btn, then visit /dashboard -> user still authenticated.

integration_issues.issue: Specialty filter from landing hero not propagated to URL query params; search results show all 8 practitioners instead of dentists only.
Auth cookie / context not cleared on logout click. Protected routes still accessible after clicking logout.

passed_flows: Landing page loads with hero-search-form and quick-spec buttons
Search page renders 8 practitioner cards + Leaflet map with markers
Practitioner profile shows photo, name, bio, slots (Timetable)
Anonymous slot click redirects to /connexion (state.from preserved)
Patient login (patient@demo.fr/Patient123!) successful, returns to practitioner page
Slot click opens booking-dialog, fill reason, booking-confirm -> redirect /dashboard with new appt in upcoming-list
cancel-{id} button removes appt from upcoming and adds to Historique with 'Annulé' badge
Practitioner login + dashboard: profile-form, weekly-schedule (slot-monday-09:00 toggle), profile-save shows 'Profil enregistré' toast
Registration (/inscription) - role tabs work, creates account, redirects to /dashboard
action_items: Fix Landing hero-search Select: ensure Dentiste selection from [data-testid=hero-search-specialty] is captured and appended to URL query string. Verify Select onValueChange handler updates form state and that handleSubmit pushes ?specialty=...

Fix logout flow in Header.jsx / AuthContext: ensure logout button calls POST /api/auth/logout with withCredentials=true, awaits response, then sets user=false and navigates. Verify backend Set-Cookie clears the JWT cookie with samesite=none; secure=true; max-age=0.
critical_code_review_comments: Logout must await backend /api/auth/logout call before resetting client state to ensure cookie is cleared server-side.
Hero-search Select likely missing controlled value/onValueChange binding to form state.
seed_data_creation: Created one test patient registration test_pat_{ts}@example.com / TestPass123! (transient)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-test (1) Landing hero specialty filter -> /recherche?specialty=Dentiste, (2) Logout actually clears cookie+context so /dashboard redirects to /connexion. All other booking/cancel/practitioner/registration flows already verified working end-to-end against preview URL.
rca of the issue: Specialty filter: Radix Select component options not selected by test - likely the Select is missing controlled binding OR uses a different rendering (possibly Command/Combobox) causing the selected value to not be included on form submit. Logout: /api/auth/logout endpoint likely not invoked or backend not returning Set-Cookie that expires the httpOnly cookie; alternatively AuthContext state not being reset to false after the call so PrivateRoute redirect doesn't fire.
